meta.title: Bastet Hurghada — AI-Powered Smart Apartment Hotel on the Red Sea
meta.description: The Red Sea's first AI-powered smart apartment hotel. 270 fully equipped apartments with smart technology, rooftop bar, pool, spa & co-working. Steps from Mamsha Promenade.

hero.subtitle: The Red Sea's first AI-powered smart apartment hotel. Your home in Hurghada — but smarter, easier, and more connected than home ever was.

home.conceptTitle: A new way to stay in Hurghada
home.conceptText: Bastet is the missing middle. Not an all-inclusive resort. Not a basic rental. A fully equipped apartment with hotel service, smart technology, and a rooftop bar with Red Sea sunsets.
home.apartmentsSubtitle: Every unit comes with a full kitchen, smart climate, keyless entry, and a private balcony. Cook breakfast in your pyjamas or dine at our terrace restaurant. It's your call.
home.studioDesc: 35 sqm of smart living with kitchenette, balcony, and everything you need.
home.oneBedDesc: 70 sqm with a separate living area — perfect for couples and longer stays.
home.twoBedDesc: 90 sqm of family space with two bedrooms and in-unit laundry.
home.penthouseDesc: 150 sqm with private rooftop pool and panoramic Red Sea views.
home.smartTitle: AI that you don't notice — until you do
home.smartSubtitle: Bastet's technology works invisibly. Your door unlocks from your phone. Your room learns your temperature. The AI concierge speaks your language, 24/7.
home.smartKeylessDesc: Unlock with your phone. No queue, no plastic card.
home.smartClimateDesc: Your room learns your preferences automatically.
home.smartConciergeDesc: Ask anything via WhatsApp or the app. Multilingual, instant.
home.smartCheckinDesc: Self-service kiosks. Arrive any hour, go straight to your room.
home.facilitiesTitle: More than a place to sleep
home.facilitiesSubtitle: Pool, rooftop bar, restaurant, spa, gym, co-working — every space designed for living, not just staying.
home.poolDesc: Main pool with loungers and poolside food & drinks service.
home.restaurantDesc: Mediterranean-Egyptian cuisine, live cooking station, poolside terrace.
home.rooftopDesc: Sunset cocktails, Red Sea views, signature drinks, live DJ weekends.
home.spaDesc: Treatment rooms, hammam, sauna, indoor pool, yoga studio.
home.gymDesc: 300 sqm gym with cardio, strength, and free weights. Free for all guests.
home.coworkingDesc: Ergonomic desks, fast Wi-Fi, power outlets. Built for remote work.
home.locationTitle: Steps from the sea, minutes from everywhere
home.locationSubtitle: Bastet sits in Hurghada's Kawthar district — steps from Mamsha Promenade, minutes from the airport, walking distance to diving, dining, and nightlife.
home.sustainSubtitle: Solar-powered. Plastic-free. Green-certified. Bastet is built for travellers who care about the Red Sea's future.
home.sustainSolarDesc: Rooftop PV system generating 20–35% of hotel electricity.
home.sustainPlasticDesc: Refillable dispensers, sustainable packaging, no plastic bottles.
home.sustainEnergyDesc: AI reduces energy consumption by 35–50% vs. conventional hotels.
home.sustainGreenDesc: Pursuing EDGE certification from IFC/World Bank.
home.ctaTitle: Be the first to experience Bastet
home.ctaSubtitle: Opening Q3 2027. Sign up for early-bird rates and exclusive launch offers.
home.ctaDisclaimer: No spam. Just launch updates and early booking access.

apartments.title: Apartments
apartments.subtitle: Every unit comes fully equipped with a kitchen — because freedom means choice. Cook, dine out, work, or do nothing. It's your call.

features.smartLock: Smart lock — keyless entry via phone
features.climate: Smart climate that learns your preferences

facilities.title: Facilities & Experiences
facilities.subtitle: Bastet is designed as a destination, not a transit area. Every space invites you to stay a while.

smartHotel.title: The Smart Hotel
smartHotel.subtitle: Bastet isn't a robot hotel. The AI is invisible. You just notice that everything works better, faster, and more personally than you're used to.

keyless.title: Keyless Smart Entry
keyless.description: Unlock your apartment with your phone. No check-in queue, no plastic key card, no waiting. Walk straight from the airport to your room.

checkin.title: Automated Check-in
checkin.description: Self-service kiosks in the lobby — arrive at any hour, scan your ID, get your room. 24/7, no reception desk needed.

concierge.title: AI Concierge
concierge.description: Ask anything via WhatsApp, the Bastet app, or the lobby screen. Restaurant bookings, diving trips, airport transfers, local tips — multilingual and instant.

climate.title: Smart Climate & Lighting
climate.description: Your room learns your preferences. Lights dim automatically at night. AC adjusts when you leave. Wake up to your ideal temperature.

app.title: App-Based Everything
app.description: Order food, book spa treatments, request housekeeping, control your room — all from the Bastet app on your phone.

pricing.title: Smart Pricing
pricing.description: AI-driven dynamic pricing means you always get the best rate for the demand period — and early bookers benefit from better deals.

sustainability.title: Sustainability
sustainability.subtitle: Respect the Red Sea
sustainability.intro: Sustainability isn't a marketing add-on at Bastet — it's built into the building and operations from day one.

solar.title: Solar Energy
solar.description: of hotel electricity generated by our rooftop PV system, powered by 3,500+ hours of Red Sea sunshine per year.

energy.title: Smart Energy Management
energy.description: reduction in energy consumption vs. conventional hotels, driven by AI-powered climate and lighting optimization.

plastic.title: Zero Single-Use Plastics
plastic.description: Refillable dispensers in every room. Sustainable packaging throughout. No plastic bottles, no straws, no waste.

food.title: Food Waste Composting
food.description: Restaurant waste composted and used for property landscaping. Closing the loop on the Red Sea coast.

ev.title: EV Charging
ev.description: electric vehicle charging stations in covered parking — ready for the future of transport.

certification.title: Green Building Certification
certification.description: Pursuing EDGE certification from IFC/World Bank — the global standard for resource-efficient buildings.

water.title: Water Conservation
water.description: Smart leak detection, low-flow fixtures, pool water recycling. Every drop matters on the Red Sea coast.

digitalNomads.title: Digital Nomads
digitalNomads.headline: Work from the Red Sea
digitalNomads.subtitle: Fast Wi-Fi, co-working spaces, a kitchen to cook, and the reef to dive after work. Bastet is built for people who live and work from anywhere.
digitalNomads.wifiDesc: Not hotel Wi-Fi — real, fast, reliable internet built for video calls and uploads.
digitalNomads.coworkingDesc: Ergonomic desks, power outlets, USB charging, quiet zones. Not a repurposed lobby.
digitalNomads.kitchenDesc: Cook your own meals, save money, eat healthy. Every apartment has a full kitchenette.
digitalNomads.monthlyDesc: From ~$35/night for long stays. The only professionally managed long-stay option in Hurghada.
digitalNomads.communityDesc: Pool, rooftop bar, gym, restaurant — a built-in social life without the isolation of a rental apartment.
digitalNomads.divingDesc: World-class coral reefs minutes away. Morning standup, afternoon dive. That's the Red Sea nomad life.
digitalNomads.morningDesc: Wake up, make coffee in your kitchen, work from the balcony or co-working space.
digitalNomads.middayDesc: Lunch at The Terrace or cook something quick. Dip in the pool between meetings.
digitalNomads.afternoonDesc: Close the laptop. Grab your gear. The reef is fifteen minutes away.
digitalNomads.eveningDesc: Sunset cocktails on the rooftop. Dinner at The Terrace. Plan tomorrow's dive.

location.title: Location
location.subtitle: Steps from the sea, minutes from everywhere
location.intro: Bastet sits in Hurghada's Kawthar district — the city's premier tourism corridor, where the promenade meets the reef.
location.mamshaDesc: Hurghada's premier waterfront walkway with restaurants, shops, and beach access — literally steps from your door.
location.airportDesc: Minutes from Hurghada International Airport. No shuttle needed, short transfer. Direct flights from all major European cities.
location.divingDesc: World-class coral reefs and dive centres within walking distance. The Red Sea's underwater world at your doorstep.
location.sunshineDesc: 3,500+ hours of sunshine per year — one of the sunniest destinations on Earth. Warm enough for beach all year.
location.flightsDesc: 3–5 hour flights from Germany, UK, Italy, Russia, Poland, Czech Republic. Your Red Sea apartment is closer than you think.
location.hurghadaText: Hurghada welcomed over 15.8 million visitors to Egypt in 2024, with the government targeting 30 million by 2030. It's not an emerging destination — it's an established one that's about to get a smart upgrade.

blog.title: Journal
blog.subtitle: Stories, guides, and insider tips from the Red Sea coast.
blog.comingSoonText: We're working on guides, stories, and insider tips about Hurghada and the Red Sea. Check back soon.

about.title: About Bastet
about.subtitle: Named after the ancient Egyptian goddess of home, comfort, and protection
about.storyP1: Bastet Hurghada is the Red Sea's first AI-powered smart apartment hotel — a new category of accommodation that didn't exist before.
about.storyP2: We combine the space and independence of a fully equipped apartment with the service, technology, and lifestyle of a premium hotel, all powered by artificial intelligence.
about.storyP3: Named after the ancient Egyptian goddess of home, comfort, and protection, Bastet represents a philosophy: your stay should feel like home, but smarter, easier, and more connected than home ever was.
about.philosophyP1: We're not an all-inclusive resort. We're not a basic Airbnb. We're the missing middle that modern travellers have been waiting for — and we're the first in the world to deliver it with AI at the core.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Questions, partnerships, or just want to say hello? We'd love to hear from you.

contact.subject: Subject
